health_conditions: small keloid scar on face from popped pimple ~20 years ago

benefits.description: Facial keloid scar of ~20 years reduced by over half in less than 4 weeks after starting GHK-CU; previously could fit bump under fingernail, now cannot; barely noticeable in photos taken same lighting/angle

protocol_notes: Started Tirz in October; no keloid changes noticed until starting GHK-CU 2.5mg daily in December. Took comparison photos on December 15th and ~3-4 weeks later. Credits GHK-CU as the active agent.
